title: Racy Polish Apricot Flatbread
description: A peppery, crunchy flatbread featuring sweet apricots and smoked cheese, perfect for a sugar‑free solo dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl mix flour, salt, black pepper flakes, caraway seeds, and instant yeast.
Add warm water and olive oil; stir until a sticky dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5 minutes until smooth.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let it rise for 30 minutes until doubled in size.
Punch down the dough, divide it into 2 portions, and roll each into a flat circle.
Sprinkle chopped dried apricots, grated cheese, and crushed walnuts over each circle, then fold the edges slightly to retain filling.
Let the flatbreads rise again for 15 minutes covered with a towel.
Bake on a preheated oven at 220°C for 15 minutes until golden and crunchy.
